calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Muhs, via ZOOM, for Kason Leung and Ted Leung, Personal Representatives.

The court advises counsel that this matter had primarily been set for hearing today to address the almost $500,000 transfer that was made without the court's authorization which violates probate code. The court then confirms with counsel that he understands that he should not take similar action, moving forward.

The Accounting Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-27-2021 Continued To Nov-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-25-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-11-2021 Continued To Aug-25-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-14-2021 Continued To Aug-11-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jaimie Bombard, via ZOOM, for Kimberly Esther Leung, Personal Representative.

The court at the outset queries counsel regarding the status of this matter. Counsel reports that she is asking for a continuance as she has been working on the petition but requires additional documents to complete the petition. Counsel advises that she intends to file a Petition for Final Distribution as soon as the papers are ready. The court confirms with counsel that she expects waivers to be filed.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to August 11, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Balmy. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-16-2021 Continued To Jul-14-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
